name: Gefuellte Flaedle- Pfannkuchen (Filled Crepe
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the eggs, milk, flour, salt, and sugar in a bowl until smooth.
2. Pour batter into a greased skillet.
3. Cook over low heat until golden brown.
4. While still hot, fill with preserves and roll up.
5. Dust with sugar and serve as hot as possible.
Sugarless Fläle can also be filled with chopped, seasoned leftover meat or ground meat, arranged in a greased ovenproof dish, and briefly baked. Serves 4.
